name: sta-post-default
description: Sign-off STA: handoff gate (routed.v + SPEF + SDC) → tcl → OpenSTA → parse + skew → report with pre-vs-post delta

tasks.content: [STA-POST HANDOFF] Verify routed.v + routed.spef + SDC fresh
tasks.detail:
Run scripts/preflight.sh <ip> first.
Refuse stale or missing inputs:
- [ ] <ip>/pnr/out/routed.v exists, non-empty
- [ ] <ip>/pnr/out/routed.spef exists, non-empty (0 bytes = silent extraction failure)
- [ ] <ip>/sta/out/<ip>.sdc exists
- [ ] mtime(routed.v) >= mtime(<ip>/pnr/out/cts.v)
- [ ] mtime(routed.spef) >= mtime(<ip>/pnr/out/routed.def)
Failure modes: `[STA-POST HANDOFF MISSING]` (rc=5), `[STA-POST SPEF MISSING]` (rc=5), `[STA-POST STALE NETLIST]` / `[STA-POST STALE SPEF]` (rc=6).
Gate: all four green.

Same Liberty corner as /syn /sta /pnr — mismatch silently produces wrong WNS. Use workflow/scripts/pdk_env.sh so bundled common_ai_agent/pdk paths work from any launch cwd.
- [ ] command -v sta
- [ ] [ -r $SKY130_LIB ]
Gate: tool + PDK both green.

Run scripts/write_sta_post_tcl.sh <ip>. tcl must contain:
- [ ] read_liberty <absolute SKY130_LIB>
- [ ] read_verilog routed.v
- [ ] link_design <top>
- [ ] read_sdc <ip>.sdc
- [ ] **read_spef routed.spef** (the new ingredient vs /sta)
- [ ] quiet scan_en case analysis, only when the port exists
- [ ] report_checks for setup/hold/min_max
- [ ] report_clock_skew (post-CTS skew)
- [ ] report_wns / report_tns
Gate: run.tcl exists and references all three input files correctly.

tasks.content: [STA-POST] Run OpenSTA → sta.log + setup.rpt + hold.rpt + skew.rpt
tasks.detail:
Run scripts/run_sta_post.sh <ip>. Common errors:
- 'Error: read_spef parse error' → SPEF truncated, re-run /pnr-route
- 'Error: net not found' → routed.v / SPEF mismatch (different runs)
- 'No constraints' → SDC pathing wrong
Gate: sta rc=0, setup.rpt + hold.rpt + skew.rpt all non-empty.

Run scripts/parse_wns.sh <ip>.
schema: same as /sta wns.json + `mode: post_route`, `clocks[].max_skew_ps`, `clocks[].max_latency_ps`.
Gate: wns.json exists, every SSOT clock present.

Run scripts/write_report.sh <ip>. Report must include:
- [ ] result line (PASS / SETUP FAIL / HOLD FAIL)
- [ ] per-clock table: period, setup WNS+TNS, hold WNS+viol, max skew
- [ ] **delta vs /sta**: pre setup_wns | post setup_wns | Δ — flag positive Δ as suspicious
- [ ] next-step hints if FAIL
Gate: sta.report.md written.
